BdG.description: Set to 1 in superconducting systems, 0 (default) for normal systems

Decimation.description: Option for using Decimation. Type 1,2 or 3 to use it, 0 to not use it

Decimation_block.description: size of maximal block to decimate

Decimate_only_Dyson.description: set 1 for decimate only the Dyson equation, and 0 otherwise.

Lattice_Type.description: set 0 for square lattice, 1 for graphene lattice, 2 for Silicene

magnetic_field.description: Type 0 not to use magnetic field, or 1 to use magnetic field

magnetic_field_trans_invariant.description: Type 0 not to use magnetic field, or 1 to use magnetic field

Silent.description: Set 1 in order to mute output messages

debug.description: Set to 1 in order to export debug informations.

Scatter_region.description: Parameters used to create scattering region

epsilon.description: On-site energy in the scattering region

vargamma.description: Hopping parameter in the scattering region

pair_potential.description: Superconducting pair potential, with abs standing for the absolute value and phase for the complex phase

End_Type.description: Lead end type in case of hexagonal lattice

pair_potential.description: Superconducting pair potential, with abs standing for the absolute value and phase for the complex phase

Lead_parameters.description: Parameters used to create leads attached to the scattering region

epsilon.description: On-site energy in the scattering region

vargamma.description: Hopping parameter in the scattering region

End_Type.description: Lead end type in case of hexagonal lattice

pair_potential.description: Superconducting pair potential, with abs standing for the absolute value and phase for the complex phase

epsilon.description: On-site energy in the scattering region

vargamma.description: Hopping parameter in the scattering region

End_Type.description: Lead end type in case of hexagonal lattice

pair_potential.description: Superconducting pair potential, with abs standing for the absolute value and phase for the complex phase
